3070580.name: The Home: Into The Woods
3070580.description:
The Home: Into The Woods Legacy

The Game

Alone in the woods or at least that's what you think. You are searching for Arthur Blackwood who, after fleeing the court, was seen in the forest near Willow Woods Children's Care Home. Instead of finding him though you find yourself in a life or death nightmare. Collect 5 drawings to escape.

A Piece From The Creator

I grew up in a children's care home and I suffered a great deal of pain and trauma. So I am making this game to try and help remove some of it and fuel my pain into something good. This game is to promote my full version of my game so none off this game is canon to the full game. Once I hit my GoFundMe goal I will work on the main game.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
